themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 31 commentary
evidenceTrail.detail: And these are the kings that reigned in the land of Edom, before there reigned any king over...

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 31 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: מֶ֖לֶךְ: And these are the kings - a king

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 32 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ: reigned - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel
